title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 469.463 - Uniformity considered in application and construction
text:
469.463.  Uniformity considered in application and construction. — In applying and construing sections 469.401 to 469.467, consideration shall be given to the need to promote uniformity of the law with respect to its subject matter among states that enact it.
(L. 2001 H.B. 241)
